headline: Cloudflare (NET): The Best Edge Computing Stock to Buy Right Now
summary: Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE:NET) is one of the 10 Best Edge Computing Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 14, 2026, Piper Sandler upgraded Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE:NET) to Overweight from Neutral with a $222 price target. The firm highlighted the company’s positioning across multiple areas, including Delivery, APSEC, NaaS, SASE, IAS, and IaaS, and said the […]
